arts.ttl: LIVE: The FA Cup quarterfinal heads to London as Fulham take on Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace head to Fulham in the quarterfinals of the FA Cup as both teams look to clinch silverware this season. ESPN has live updates.

arts.ttl: Why is Jean-Philippe Mateta wearing protective headgear for Crystal Palace?
arts.sum: French striker protecting injured ear with water polo-style helmet during FA Cup quarter-final return against Fulham

arts.ttl: Report: Crystal Palace make decision on Adam Wharton, price named for Man United target
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have made it clear that any club wanting to sign Adam Wharton this summer will need to pay a hefty price, slapping a £100 million valuation on the young midfielder, according to a report. Since arriving at Selhurst Park in January 2024, Wharton has been nothing short of a revelation. The 21-year-old has […] The post Report: Crystal Palace make decision on Adam Wharton, price named for Man United target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Fulham v Crystal Palace line-ups: Muniz starts, two Whites changes, Eagles star returns
arts.sum: Rodrigo Muniz gets the nod ahead of Raul Jimenez to start up front for Fulham in the FA Cup quarter-final at Craven Cottage. It is one of two Whites changes – the other sees Sasa Lukic return from suspension, replacing Emile Smith Rowe, who drops for the bench. Crystal Palace, meanwhile, welcome back fit-again striker […] The post Fulham v Crystal Palace line-ups: Muniz starts, two Whites changes, Eagles star returns appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Team News: Glasner names side for Craven Cottage quarter-final
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has made one change to his team for Saturday's (12:15 GMT KO) FA Cup clash away to Fulham - with Jean-Philippe Mateta returning to the side.

arts.ttl: Fulham v Crystal Palace: FA Cup quarter-final – live
arts.sum: FA Cup quarter-final news from the 12.15pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read the latest Football Daily | Mail Dominic Oliver Glasner has been getting chatty with the ITV pundits on the resplendent Craven Cottage turf before kick-off. arts.ttl: Live Blog: Fulham v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are battling for a place in the FA Cup semi-finals when they take on Fulham at Craven Cottage this afternoon (12:15 GMT) – follow live updates from West London below!

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two London clubs face off in the first of an intriguing set of FA Cup quarter-finals this weekend as Fulham take on Crystal Palace at Craven Cottage. Palace enter the cup tie as one of the Premier League's form teams, but they're six points behind Fulham, having played one game fewer.
